Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs DANIEL STELTER,and ALESSANDRO RAIMONDI's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Defendants DANIEL STELTER and ALESSANDRO RAIMONDI's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is GRANTED. The notice of conditional settlement is vacated.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.
